creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
I needed to restart kwin (e.g. logout, log back in) with kwin 5.23.5 and fontconfig 2.13.94_1,1 after changing the window title fonts, but I did end up with steps-mono [UKWN].

Full steps I took:
- build steps-mono with poudriere
- pkg install steps-mono
- alt-f2, "fonts"
- change all my fonts to match the ones in your screenshot
- click apply, then ok
- notice window title has not changed
- logout, log in

In other words: can't reproduce.
